extName.description: Extension name shown in the browser and Chrome Web Store.

extDesc.message: An extension that prevents and limits endless scrolling through short videos, helping you stay focused and save time.
extDesc.description: Extension description shown in the browser and Chrome Web Store.

modeLimiter.description: Popup mode selector: limit number of Shorts.

modeFocus.description: Popup mode selector: block all Shorts.

statsEscapedTitle.description: Stats page 1 title when the user has escaped at least once.

statsWelcomeTitle.description: Stats page 1 title before any data exists.

statsKeepMomentum.description: Stats page 1 subtitle when the user has escaped at least once.

statsStartBoost.description: Stats page 1 subtitle before any data exists.

statsNoData.description: Stats value shown when there is no data yet.

statsEscapeTimes.description: Stats page 1 value, plural (more than one escape).

githubLink.description: Popup footer link to the GitHub repository.

altHelp.description: Alt text for the help icon.

altLogo.description: Alt text for the Descrollify logo.

altSettings.description: Alt text for the settings icon.

altPrevPage.description: Alt text for the previous-stats-page arrow.

altNextPage.description: Alt text for the next-stats-page arrow.

altBuyMeCoffee.description: Alt text for the Buy Me A Coffee button.

settingCustomUrl.description: Label for the custom-URL input row.

hintRefreshTabs.message: Refresh open YouTube tabs to apply
hintRefreshTabs.description: Hint shown after toggling Hide Shorts thumbnails.

resetConfirm.description: Reset button label asking for confirmation.

resetSuccess.description: Reset button label after a successful reset.

descrollifyHeader.description: Header on the in-page blocker toast.

focusNotification.message: TOTAL FOCUS MODE PREVENTED YOU FROM SCROLLING AND REDIRECTED YOU BACK. YOU CAN TURN THIS MODE OFF IN THE DESCROLLIFY POPUP
focusNotification.description: Toast shown when Focus mode redirects the user off a Short.

limitReachedNote.message: YOU'VE REACHED YOUR SHORTS LIMIT. TIME TO STEP AWAY AND STAY FOCUSED!
limitReachedNote.description: Fallback toast shown when the watch limit is reached and motivational lines fail to load.

infoLead.message: Descrollify helps you spend less time on short videos. Here's how the modes work, what each option does, and answers to common questions.

infoModesIntro.message: Descrollify has three modes. Pick the one that matches how much you want to cut back:

infoModeOffLabel.description: Mode name in the help list.

infoModeOffDesc.message: — Nothing is blocked. Watch short videos as usual.
infoModeOffDesc.description: Description following the OFF mode label.

infoModeLimitLabel.description: Mode name in the help list.

infoModeLimitDesc.message: — Set a daily number of short videos. Watch up to that many, then Descrollify blocks the rest.
infoModeLimitDesc.description: Description following the Limit mode label.

infoModeFocusLabel.description: Mode name in the help list.

infoModeFocusDesc.message: — Blocks all short videos and stops short-video links from opening, so nothing slips through. You can also hide their thumbnails so you don't even see them.
infoModeFocusDesc.description: Description following the Focus mode label.

infoSwitchStep1.message: Click the Descrollify icon in your browser's toolbar.

infoSwitchStep2.message: Choose a mode: OFF, Limit, or Focus.

infoSwitchStep3.message: Change any extra settings if you want to.

infoSwitchStep4.message: That's it — the mode is active right away.

infoOptResetA.message: Clears all the usage numbers Descrollify has tracked and starts your stats over from zero. Click RESET STATISTICS to do it.

infoOptFocusA.message: Hides the preview images for short videos so they don't tempt you. Turn it on by clicking "Hide short videos thumbnails" and making sure the radio button next to it is selected.

infoOptLimitMaxA.message: How many short videos you can watch before Descrollify starts blocking. Type a number from 1 to 99, or use the up/down arrows.

infoOptLimitTimerA.message: How long the block lasts once it kicks in. Set it with the Hours, Minutes, and Seconds dropdowns. Leave all three at 0 if you want the block to stay until you change the mode yourself.

infoFaqWhereQ.message: Does it block short videos everywhere?

infoFaqWhereA.message: For now it only blocks YouTube Shorts. Support for other platforms is in the works.

infoFaqPrivacyQ.message: Does it track my history or collect my data?

infoFaqPrivacyA.message: No. Descrollify never looks at your watch or browser history. It only counts the short videos you scroll past to build your stats, and everything stays on your own computer. It doesn't save video links or any other personal information.

infoDonatePrefix.message: Support development by making a donation:
infoDonatePrefix.description: Help page footer text before the donate link.
